---
name: Security Vulnerability
about: Report a security vulnerability (CONFIDENTIAL - DO NOT USE PUBLIC ISSUES)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
---

## ⚠️ PLEASE READ FIRST

**Do NOT report public security issues in GitHub Issues.**

Instead, please follow our responsible disclosure process:

📧 **Email:** security@humanshield-awareness.de

**What to include in your email:**
1. Clear description of the vulnerability
2. Steps to reproduce
3. Potential impact assessment
4. Proof-of-concept (if safe to share)
5. Suggested fix (if you have one)

**Timeline:**
- Initial response: Within 24-48 hours
- Fix assessment: 7-14 days
- Coordinated disclosure: Based on severity

**Thank you for helping keep HumanShield secure!**

---

## Vulnerability Details
(If you accidentally posted here, please delete and email instead)

### Type
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization bypass
- [ ] Data exposure/Information disclosure
- [ ] Injection (SQL, Command, Template, etc.)
- [ ] CSRF/SSRF
- [ ] XSS
- [ ] Cryptographic weakness
- [ ] Other: ___

### Severity
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

### Affected Component
- [ ] Frontend (Phishing Detection UI)
- [ ] License Server
- [ ] API
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Other: ___

### Description
[Provide detailed description]

### Steps to Reproduce
[Clear reproduction steps]

### Impact
[Describe the potential impact]
